title: QuickHarvest
description: Right-click to harvest and instantly replant fully grown crops with a built-in, vanilla-balanced seed tax.
body:
# 🌾 QuickHarvest

> The smart, lag-free, and vanilla-balanced right-click harvesting solution for Minecraft.

**QuickHarvest** is a lightweight, server-friendly quality-of-life datapack that completely redefines how you farm. Instead of the tedious cycle of breaking mature crops and manually replanting them, simply **right-click** to harvest! 

Unlike basic harvesting mods that give you "free" replants, QuickHarvest keeps your survival experience authentic by implementing a strict, automated **seed tax** directly from your dropped loot.

---

## ✨ Features

* **⚡ Effortless Farming:** Right-click any fully grown crop to harvest its yields and instantly replant a fresh one in a single click.
* **⚖️ Vanilla-Balanced (Seed Tax):** The datapack intercepts the dropped loot in mid-air and deducts exactly **one seed/crop** as the cost for replanting. If a crop drops only a single seed, it is completely consumed, preventing any item duplication!
* **👥 Multiplayer & Co-op Ready:** The seed deduction logic is bound to the dropped item entity at the exact block coordinates. This guarantees that the correct crop pays the "tax," even if multiple players are farming side-by-side.

---

## 🥕 Supported Crops

| Crop | Mature State | Replant Cost (Deducted from Loot) |
| :---: | :--- | :--- |
| **Wheat** | `age=7` | 🌾 1 Wheat Seed |
| **Carrots** | `age=7` | 🥕 1 Carrot |
| **Potatoes** | `age=7` | 🥔 1 Potato |
| **Beetroots** | `age=3` | 🫚 1 Beetroot Seed |

---

## 📦 Installation & Setup

1. Download the `QuickHarvest` datapack.
2. Drop it directly into your world's datapacks directory: `.minecraft/saves/YOUR_WORLD/datapacks/`
3. Launch your world or type `/reload` in the chat.
